verdict: 2026-06-25 17:10:33 PDT — Sound design. Repointing only the fragile CSP-content assertion to `/api/health` uses the existing global `securityHeaders` middleware contract, preserves a live delivered-header check, avoids app-code churn, and matches the repo's plain `node:test`/native `fetch` convention. Reordering CI to Test then Build aligns with the root `npm test && npm run build` gate and removes the temporary build-before-test workaround. No dependency or hand-rolled replacement issue found.
